Metad Reports

Brady Johnston

12/08/2020

fl <- list.files(pattern = "COLVAR", recursive = T, full.names = T)

read.colvar <- function(x){
  tempdf = read.table(x)
  colnames(tempdf) = c("time", "path.sss", "path.zzz", "metad.rbias", "walls.bias", "rmsd0", "rmsd1")
  tempdf$name = str_trunc(str_trunc(x, ellipsis = "", width = 9),6, side = "left", ellipsis = "")
  return(as.data.frame(tempdf))
}


dfl = lapply(fl, read.colvar)

df = do.call("rbind", dfl)

df$name <- as.factor(df$name)

head(df)
##   time path.sss  path.zzz metad.rbias walls.bias    rmsd0    rmsd1   name
## 1    0 9.707039 -0.028058    0.000000          0 0.043497 2.123624 AJ_01/
## 2    1 9.712674 -0.024705    0.000000          0 0.068640 2.124752 AJ_01/
## 3    2 9.715892 -0.023344    0.999771          0 0.076695 2.129205 AJ_01/
## 4    3 9.707418 -0.023401    1.970424          0 0.082567 2.122518 AJ_01/
## 5    4 9.707432 -0.022187    2.913710          0 0.090124 2.124700 AJ_01/
## 6    5 9.704295 -0.022889    3.831537          0 0.090311 2.126099 AJ_01/

Plots

ggplot(df, aes(x = path.sss, 
               y = path.zzz, 
               colour = time/1000)) + 
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2, size = 0.1) +
  scale_colour_viridis_c() +
  facet_wrap(~name) + 
  simpleThemes::simple_light() +
  labs(colour = "Time (ns)", 
       title = "MetaD Simulation Space")

Density of Points

ggplot(df, aes(x = path.sss, 
               y = path.zzz, 
               colour = time/1000)) + 
  # geom_point(alpha = 0.2, size = 0.1) +
  geom_density_2d_filled(contour_var = "ndensity", bins = 20) + 
  
  scale_colour_viridis_c() +
  facet_wrap(~name) + 
  simpleThemes::simple_light(legend = F) + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:10, expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0,1,1), expand = c(0,0)) +
  labs(colour = "Time (ns)", 
       title = "MetaD Simulation Space")

RMSD Plots

colours=RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(1,"Blues")
## Warning in RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(1, "Blues"): minimal value for n is 3, returning requested palette with 3 different levels
df %>% 
  select(time, name, rmsd0, rmsd1) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(rmsd0, rmsd1), 
               names_prefix = "rmsd", 
               names_to = "Model"
               ) %>% 

ggplot(aes(x = time/1000, 
               y = value, 
               colour = Model)) + 
  geom_line() +
  facet_wrap(~name) +
  labs(x = "Time (ns)", 
       y = "RMSD", 
       title = "RMSD for simulations.")

Hills plots.

hfl = list.files(pattern = "HILLS", recursive = T, full = T)

read.HILLS <- function(x){
  tempdf = read.table(x)
  colnames(tempdf) = c("time", "path.sss", "path.zzz", "sigma_path.sss", "sigma_path.zzz", "height", "biasf")
  tempdf$name = str_trunc(str_trunc(x, ellipsis = "", width = 8),6, side = "left", ellipsis = "")
  return(as.data.frame(tempdf))
}


hdf = lapply(hfl, read.HILLS)

df2 = do.call("rbind", hdf)

head(df2)
##   time path.sss    path.zzz sigma_path.sss sigma_path.zzz    height biasf
## 1    1 9.712674 -0.02470489            0.3           0.08 1.0714286    15
## 2    2 9.715892 -0.02334434            0.3           0.08 1.0404769    15
## 3    3 9.707418 -0.02340117            0.3           0.08 1.0112824    15
## 4    4 9.707432 -0.02218700            0.3           0.08 0.9836960    15
## 5    5 9.704295 -0.02288914            0.3           0.08 0.9575767    15
## 6    6 9.696488 -0.02249420            0.3           0.08 0.9329187    15
##     name
## 1 BAJ_01
## 2 BAJ_01
## 3 BAJ_01
## 4 BAJ_01
## 5 BAJ_01
## 6 BAJ_01

Plot

ggplot(df2, aes(time/1e3, height)) + 
  geom_line() + 
  scale_y_continuous() + 
  simpleThemes::simple_light() + 
  labs(x = "Time (ns)", 
       y = "Height",
       title = "Height over Time") + 
  facet_wrap(~name)
